references.name: Swissted
observedPatterns: Single accent color on neutral background
Uppercase sans-serif type as primary visual element
adaptedElements: Uppercase small-caps labels for section headings and metadata
Single Swiss blue accent on monochrome base
Asymmetric left-heavy layouts with generous margin

references.name: Helvetica Documentary Site
observedPatterns: Helvetica as sole typeface across all sizes
Extreme weight contrast (300 for display, 700 for labels)
Minimal decoration — type weight and size create hierarchy
adaptedElements: Light-weight (300) display headings with tight letter-spacing
Bold (700) micro-labels at 0.75rem with wide letter-spacing

references.name: Friends of Type
observedPatterns: Grid-based card layouts with consistent gutters
Black border outlines instead of shadows for card edges
adaptedElements: Border-only card styling (no shadows, no border-radius)
Source Code Pro monospace for timestamps, counts, and technical labels
8px base spacing unit for mathematical rhythm
